core_mechanism: extreme-point (vertex) characterization of a convex body carved out by positive-semidefiniteness constraints (a spectrahedron), via a necessary-and-sufficient rank/support condition, together with a constructive algorithm to enumerate those extreme points
brief_reason: The abstract gives a necessary and sufficient condition for a point to be an extreme point of a convex set defined by a positive-semidefiniteness (positive partial transpose) constraint plus an algorithm to find such extreme points, which is exactly convex-geometric extreme-point analysis of a spectrahedron.
